name: Privacy Filter
description: Best-effort privacy guard for prompt routing, transcript redaction, and outbound masking.

enabled.label: Enable plugin
enabled.help: Turns privacy filtering hooks on or off.

secureProvider.label: Secure provider override
secureProvider.help: Provider id to route sensitive prompts to (for example local ollama provider).

secureModel.label: Secure model override
secureModel.help: Model id to route sensitive prompts to.

routeSensitivePrompts.label: Route sensitive prompts
routeSensitivePrompts.help: When sensitive content is detected in the user prompt, override provider/model.

redactTranscript.label: Redact transcript
redactTranscript.help: Redacts sensitive strings before writing messages to session JSONL.

redactOutboundMessages.label: Redact outbound messages
redactOutboundMessages.help: Redacts sensitive strings before sending final channel messages.

redactionToken.label: Redaction token
redactionToken.help: Replacement token used for masked text.

customPatterns.label: Custom regex patterns
customPatterns.help: Extra regex patterns (as JS regex source) to match and redact.
